target: Caption link auto-expand fix: 'Read the long form' link now opens <details id='eg-evaluate'> on click (ISS-1612, ISS-1642, ISS-1711). ISS-1611 OBE.

patches.description: Caption link at line 460 now opens the <details id='eg-evaluate'> element in addition to switching tabs. Previously the link called showTab('evaluate') which revealed the Evaluate tab but left the <details> collapsed, requiring a second click. Adding .open=true means clicking 'Read the long form →' lands the reader directly on expanded content. Applies to ISS-1612, ISS-1642, ISS-1711 (all reference the same link).

obe_resolutions.reason: Verified: grep for model’s in docs/index.html returns zero hits. All apostrophes in model's are ASCII throughout, including in the eg-evaluate section. The inconsistency flagged by ISS-1611 has already been corrected. No patch needed.

tldr_evidence:
ISS-1612, ISS-1642, ISS-1711 all refer to the same link at docs/index.html line 460: Read the long form. The
element at line 611 defaults to collapsed, so readers landing via this link saw only the summary. Fix: added document.getElementById('eg-evaluate').open=true to onclick so the element auto-expands. Patch verified: grep confirms one occurrence updated. node test.js: 3607 passed, 0 failed.
tldr_verdict: Patch applied and tested. ISS-1611 confirmed OBE.
